college_info.college_name: KVK College of Pharmacy: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The TG EAPCET 2026 registration has commenced for KVK College of Pharmacy admission to BPharma and BE/BTech courses. The deadline to register without a late fee is Apr 4, 2026. The entrance exam for BPharm is scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, while the BE/BTech exam will be held from May 9 to May 11, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: Is KVK College of Pharmacy worth considering?
faqs.answer: KVK College of Pharmacy is a distinguished institution offering Pharm.D, M.Pharma, B.Pharma. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences field. KVK College of Pharmacy is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. KVK College of Pharmacy has received an impressive review rating of 3.1 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 3.25 for Campus Life, 2 for Placements, 3.75 for Faculty, and 3.25 for Infrastructure.

faqs.question: Which courses does KVK College of Pharmacy offer?
faqs.answer: KVK College of Pharmacy provides programmes including Pharm.D, M.Pharma, B.Pharma in streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Post Baccalaureate, Pharmaceutical.

faqs.question: What is the current fee structure for courses at KVK College of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: The fees structure for programs offerred by the KVK College of Pharmacy is INR 204000 - INR 408000.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the college placements, which are held in the month of May 2025.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 97% of students are placed, with an average package ranging from 2.5 to 3.7 LPA. Companies like Hetero, Divis, Dr. Reddy's, and MSN recruit students, mainly for roles in the Analytical Department. Around 90% of placements happen through campus drives, and offer letters are issued within the college itself. The college provides good learning opportunities, helping students gain strong knowledge and skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is good infrastructure and a focus on developing strong communication skills, which helps in building perfect pharmacists both within and outside the college. The hostel facilities are available for both girls and boys outside the college, offering good accommodation that is neat and hygienic.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of KVK College of Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: A higher percentage of students are selected for good companies. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest package was 4-5 LPA. In our college, some good companies have recruited students. Internships are provided by the college, and industrial visits should be arranged by the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, studying was very good and the faculty was good. The faculty should take care of students. The lab facilities in the college were good, with all the instruments available. Classes should be kept clean, and the library facility should be good.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with its teachers and infrastructure, but not satisfied because of lack of jobs.

review_content.Placements: Our job is in hospitals so many of them come to our college, and they conduct some sort of exams, based on that, they select students for their jobs. Most of our seniors get jobs. Some get based on their percentage, and some get based on their knowledge and interviews.
review_content.Infrastructure: Library, laboratories, classrooms, and everything are good in this college. Students can get all books related to our subjects, etc. It does not provide a good hostel facility. The canteen facility is also not good, and students cannot get food and necessary things from the canteen. Medical related, sports, and games are good.

reviews_list.review_title: A good college to study. But management should consider students' complaints.

review_content.Placements: Campus drives are only for pharmacy students. Not for Pharma.D students. Most of Pharma.D students find jobs on their own. Most of them work in hospitals as clinical pharmacists, DMOs, clinical research coordinators, and in the field of pharmacovigilance. Everyone is getting a salary package up to 2.5-3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, library, and labs are well-equipped with good ambience. There is no hostel facility available in our college for boys. But there is a hostel for girls in Hayath Nagar. Students organise sports for every fest that is celebrated in the college. Sports mostly played are cricket, volleyball, kho-kho, badminton, etc.

reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college in Hyderabad for pharmacy courses.

review_content.Placements: Above 80% of the students got placed from our college. The highest salary offered was Rs. 2,00,000 per month. The lowest salary offered was Rs. 45,000 per month. The top recruiting companies of our college were pharma companies. Roles of a clinical pharmacist, DMO, and drug analysts, are offered. The highest salary of Rs. 2,00,000 per month was offered in our course by pharma companies. It is a 6 years course; pharma companies offered internships in Hyderabad.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is enabled with free Wi-Fi facility. Labs with all the facilities are available. The college library consists of all kinds of books. Quality of education is very good, and sometimes, the food served is also good. The food served in the canteen is average.

reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the college placements and the hospital provided for training.

review_content.Placements: Almost 30 students will be placed in my course for every batch. The highest package is 8 Lacs and the lowest is 7 Lacs for the course. No recruiters for my course. Almost all the students get internship in Asian institute of gaatroenterology hospital. Clinical pharmacist, Drug information service, Dmo etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and the facilities are good with having Wi-Fi, Labs, classrooms and library. Quality of the education is average. And hostel is good. For every academic year sports event will be conducted. Canteen is very small. Mefical facilities are good. Sports and games will be conducted for once per year.

admission_process.title: KVK College of Pharmacy Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: KVK College of Pharmacy admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, KVK College of Pharmacy considers scores in GPAT, TS EAMCET, and TS PGECET for admission to specific courses.KVK College of Pharmacyoffers courses at the UG, PG and Doctorate levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 2,72,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 2,20,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

There are a total of40seats available for this programme.

faqs.answer: A:    Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Srikakulam cutoff 2024 is out for admission to the MD and MS courses. As per the NEET PG Round 2 cut off, the closing ranks needed to get into Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Srikakulam varied between 3099 and, 98788 for the General AI category candidates. Considering the cutoff data, the MD in General Medicine was the most competitive specialisation for General category students in the AI quota. So, considering the latest round, students must aim to secure a rank between the cut-off range given above for Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences for MD/MS admission.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, candidates seeking admission to Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Srikakulam through Andhra Pradesh NEET can easily get at 25k under General AI quota. The Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences cutoff 2023 for the MBBS course stood at,  31800 for the General AI category candidates. faqs.question: Can I get Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Srikakulam at 25k for MBBS admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates preparing for the NEET exam to seek admission into Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Srikakulam must possess minimum 50 percentiles in class 12 to be eligible for the NEET exam. So,  75 percentiles is more than enough to get into the college via NEET exam. Candidates can further check out more about the NEET UG eligibility criteria:Below are the NEET 2024 eligibility criteria with respect to the educational background or marks obtained in the qualifying exam.Candidates must have passed Physics,  Chemistry,  Biology/Biotechnology and English subjects individually in the qualifying examination.Candidates must have studied this subject as core or additional subjects.Candidates belonging to the General category must have scored a minimum of 50 per cent in the qualifying examination.Candidates belonging to Scheduled Caste/ Scheduled Tribes/ Other Backward should have a minimum score of 40 per cent in the qualifying examination.Candidates, who belong to the General category and are applying under the Persons with Disability (PWD) Quota, must have a minimum score of 45 per cent marks in the qualifying examination.

reviews_list.review_title: Facilities are very bad faculty is good we can say.

review_content.Placements: It depends on the NEET score and the caste-based placement of seats in our college. I got a seat here in this college under the general category. Our course is MBBS, and after studying for four years, we have an internship. After that, we receive a graduation certificate.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not as expected, and we can even say it is bad. There is no Wi-Fi in the classrooms, and PowerPoint presentations don’t work effectively every time due to maintenance. Food is available in the mess, but it is not very good to eat. There is no canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Srikakulam.

review_content.Placements: MBBS, nursing, and PG courses are available here. After 4 and a half years of MBBS, we get to do an internship in the hospital. Lots of people studying here have already got PG seats. Any medical college would be the same if we're interested and have a zeal to go ahead.
review_content.Infrastructure: A small ground is available with good hostel facilities. The basketball court is good. The mess is not at all okay. Srikakulam is a rural area compared to other districts of Andhra Pradesh.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty members are awesome. Everyone is a professional doctor. Everyone here is well-trained, and the hospital is well-equipped and well-designed. This is the main hospital in the district. Many people do come here in crowds. This hospital is always loaded with patients.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good government medical college in Andhrapradesh.

review_content.Placements: We get an internship at our own college after finishing our medicine course, and then we can either pursue post-graduation or work as a graduated doctor anywhere. As the best option is to pursue higher education and a specialty, a lot of us prefer taking PG.
review_content.Infrastructure: The mess is fine. There are only two lecture halls for the whole college. There is a library. Sports and games are up to you. If we are interested, we have to buy all the equipment ourselves and play. College doesn't provide you with anything. There is no Wi-Fi in the college.

review_summary.college_name: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Srikakulam Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This is one of the best college in the state for MBBS.

content.Placements: It is a government college from Srikakulam. It contains a total of 200 seats. In 2025, it contained 150 seats. There are good packages in the government Hospital, and one can earn a good amount of pay in the future. There are only MBBS and nursing courses offered in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure, well-maintained rooms, classrooms, labs, libraries, etc. There is a basketball court in the college, and it has a good atmosphere. There is Wi-Fi available in our college, which is a better option for students who want to pursue the MBBS course.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, Has hospital with high outpatient, Infrastructure can be improved .

content.Placements: After MBBS, you can set up your own clinic or work in a private or government hospital and earn around forty thousand per month, or you can complete your postgraduation and earn more than 1 LPA. To enter postgraduation, one must give the NEET PG exam and qualify in it. The internship is in the same college in the 5th year, with a stipend of around twenty-five thousand.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good according to government standards. There are 5-6 lecture halls with power points, air conditioning, etc. Facilities in the college include separate classrooms for each department, and there is also a hospital. There is an inbuilt reading room and library in the college. In the hostel, facilities are also good. The food available in the mess is also good. There is an inbuilt reading room, gym, and recreation room in the hostel. There is a playground, basketball court, and tennis court available for students.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not as expected, and we can even say it is bad. There is no Wi-Fi in the classrooms, and PowerPoint presentations don’t work effectively every time due to maintenance. Food is available in the mess, but it is not very good to eat. There is no canteen.

description: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Srikakulam cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Srikakulam NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 23380 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Srikakulam MBBS cutoff 2025 was 23380 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 23851 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Srikakulam accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Srikakulam NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 116641 to 159325. According to this range, the most and least competitive courses are MD and MS, respectively. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Srikakulam MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisation for the General AI category was MD in Forensic Medicine and Toxicology. The round 4 closing rank for this specialisation was 116641.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Srikakulam offers a variety of MD and MS courses via the Andhra Pradesh NEET PG exam. Considering the Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Srikakulam cutoff 2022, the last-round cutoff ranged between 3419 and 6277 for the General AI category candidates. reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Small but the best college in Srikakulam district.

review_content.Placements: 70% of the students in our college are MBBS students. The highest average package for MBBS is 5–6 lacs per month. The lowest average package for MBBS is 1-3 lacs per month. 95% of students got internships from our course. Neurology and cardiology are the top roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is situated on 25 acres of land in Srikakulam. We have a hospital, medical nursing and physiotherapy colleges in our college. There is Wi-Fi everywhere in the college. The labs and classrooms are very good and the quality of the food is good compared to other medical colleges.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Students have to get the percentage according to NTRUHS to get placed. The cutoff for ACAT is 530, BCAT is 420, and around 30 students for CCAT. Internships provided in our college are good because there are many patients in the OP ward compared to other hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good and air-conditioned. Gardens available in our college are good. Food served is average. Sports like cricket, volleyball, basketball, and throwball are available in our college.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are good. Their teaching is good and clears the doubts of the students. The dissection hall is well-maintained. Exams are conducted properly with 3 internal exams and a final exam. The pass percentage is 75%. MBBS course is a bit tough but is easy if students study regularly.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely in love with the college and the course.

review_content.Placements: Hundred percent of students get placement every year with a salary of 12 LPA. We are placed in different hospitals for our clinical practice. 100% of students get internships after passing the final year examination. Medicine, surgery, and dermatology are top roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are big classrooms in our academic block with projectors and a wireless collar mic system. An air-conditioned lecture theater is also available. The food quality in our hostel is not very good, and there is one big canteen in our boys' hostel. There is a large sports ground.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Yes, the college was good and 100% placement was offered due to the government bond.

review_content.Placements: 100% placement by the government due to the bond signed by students. The average package of students is 10–12 lacs per year and the best part is that placement is very easy because of the government's big role in the health department. The treatment of the hospital is also very good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent. Because it was built by the Akhilesh government with futuristic design, the hospital is very big, like a super specialty hospital, and the teachers are also very good; they teach very well, and the student-to-teacher ratio is very good .

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Honest review of my college.

review_content.Placements: There are 100 students who get admission into one batch of MBBS from various cities and states. All students get internships at the college itself, as it has its own superfacility hospital. Many students get PG seats after completing MBBS and those who are able to make it to PG get a JRship in college as a bond with a salary up to 1 lakh.
review_content.Infrastructure: A campus of 100+ acres with a stadium, gymnasium, library, multifacility hospital, centralized AC classes, good hostel facilities, and food are available. The best medical facilities have highly qualified faculty. Good resources for clinical exposure, well-functioning labs, and a good atmosphere are there.

content.Placements: Every student admitted to this college will surely get internship in government medical College and hospital. Package given in internship is 15000 per month and in residence 80000 to 90000 per month. They are recruited by government and private medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Very good infrastructure and education in government medical College, Azamgarh .

content.Placements: There is a 100% placement guarantee for every student, whether of campus or foreign medical graduates. A stipend of 12,500 is offered as a base, which gradually increases. On-time money is deposited into bank accounts. Workloads are medium, and extra time can be worked for additional income.
content.Infrastructure: Very good infrastructure and atmosphere for study as well as other activities. Separate buildings are there for everything, like academics, library, hospital, canteen, ground, gymnasium, basketball, and badminton. Hostel facilities are very good, and a mess is also provided.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely in love with the college and the course.

content.Placements: Hundred percent of students get placement every year with a salary of 12 LPA. We are placed in different hospitals for our clinical practice. 100% of students get internships after passing the final year examination. Medicine, surgery, and dermatology are top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: There are big classrooms in our academic block with projectors and a wireless collar mic system. An air-conditioned lecture theater is also available. The food quality in our hostel is not very good, and there is one big canteen in our boys' hostel. There is a large sports ground.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Yes, the college was good and 100% placement was offered due to the government bond.

content.Placements: 100% placement by the government due to the bond signed by students. The average package of students is 10–12 lacs per year and the best part is that placement is very easy because of the government's big role in the health department. The treatment of the hospital is also very good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent. Because it was built by the Akhilesh government with futuristic design, the hospital is very big, like a super specialty hospital, and the teachers are also very good; they teach very well, and the student-to-teacher ratio is very good .

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of my college.

content.Placements: There are 100 students who get admission into one batch of MBBS from various cities and states. All students get internships at the college itself, as it has its own superfacility hospital. Many students get PG seats after completing MBBS and those who are able to make it to PG get a JRship in college as a bond with a salary up to 1 lakh.
content.Infrastructure: A campus of 100+ acres with a stadium, gymnasium, library, multifacility hospital, centralized AC classes, good hostel facilities, and food are available. reviews.review_heading: Review of government medical College chakrapanpur Azamgarh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is one of the best among the various medical colleges in UP. It spans 105 acres and includes a large hospital building, academic buildings, a big central library, an administration block, and various types of hostels for students and faculty members. The hostels are quite spacious and can easily accommodate two people. For the first and second-year students, two students per room are accommodated, and from the third year onwards, it is one room per person.

The hostel is much better than at other colleges, but the food quality in the mess is not good. A 24-hour medical facility is present. There are grounds for cricket, football, a badminton court, a volleyball court, and a gymnasium.

Vidyadayini Institute of Science, Management and Technology was founded in 2009. It is a private institute and is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. Vidyadayini Institute of Science, Management and Technology courses are offered to students at the UG, PG and Certificate levels. The institute is approved by NCTE and offers courses in Full Time mode. Vidyadayini Institute of Science, Management and Technology offers a total of 35 courses in streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Law and Humanities & Social Sciences. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.Sc., M.Sc., BCA, B.Com and B.A. and the total seat intake for the available courses is 1745. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Biotechnology, Botany, Chemistry, Computer Science and Food & Nutrition. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 16,000 to 2,20,000. Apart from this, the Vidyadayini Institute of Science, Management and Technology campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

Vidyadayini Institute of Science, Management and Technology is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.Sc., LL.M. and M.Com. The fee structure for the Vidyadayini Institute of Science, Management and Technology programmes is around INR 16,000 to 2,20,000.

review_summary.college_name: Vidyadayini Institute of Science, Management and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered was 2 LPA. The average salary package offered was 1 LPA. The top recruiting company is Wipro. Around 40% of students got internships in this course.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available such as laboratory, classrooms, and library. Sports and games are conducted in this college. The food quality is decent. Medical facilities are available.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, well-qualified, and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is very good. The course curriculum is relevant to make students ready for the industry. Semester exams are difficult.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied by the college. I recommend joining it. They offered good placements in the year 2021.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good. Many companies visit the campus with good salary packages. Many students got internships related to their courses. I'm a student of BBA and many other related courses are provided by the college to us. Very good and knowledge courses are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are so good here. Cleanliness is very important. Library, Wi-Fi, and labs are so well-designed and look very decent in view. Many sports are played in our college. Medical facilities are also available. Canteen mess food is too tasty and I loved it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of good faculty, and happy to be a part of this college .

content.Placements: The vacancy rate here is average. The highest package is around Rs 4-5 Lacs, the average package is Rs 3-4 Lacs, and the lowest is Rs 1.5-2.5 Lacs. I didn't know about top recruiting companies; 85 to 95 per cent get internships.
content.Infrastructure: There are great facilities on the campus of the college, and the infrastructure is also good. The labs are well cleaned, and the classrooms and libraries are in very good condition. The food in the mess is good, and the medical facilities are also great.

reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college to gain practical knowledge.

review_content.Placements: The B pharmacy degree is of 4 years. After B.Pharma, you can do M pharma which is of 2 years. Our college offers placement in companies like TCS, Cognizant, and Flemingo. reviews_list.review_title: Pharmacy college with well-equipped machines, apparatus and satisfactory teaching method of faculty.

Sports events are given priority, and cultural and sports events are conducted for over a month.

overview_faqs.question: Is Shri. D. Vispute College of Pharmacy and Research Center a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Shri. D. Vispute College of Pharmacy and Research Center is a well-known institution for M.Pharma, B.Pharma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Shri. D. Vispute College of Pharmacy and Research Center has a rating of 4 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.8 on campuslife, 3.4 on placements, 4.2 on faculty and 4.4 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Shri. D. D. Vispute College of Pharmacy and Research Center Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because we are in college for studies and for practical. Both are great.

content.Placements: Students should have 85 above the percentile to get admission or a diploma should be done. 120000 is the lowest package and 200000 is the highest package. Cipla and Mankind come here. 5-10 students from 120 students get placements. No internships are provided by the college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available. Labs and the library are great. Great management of chemical and apparatus is there. Teaching facilities are understanding. All have done Ph.D. or master's. Teachers solve all the doubts of students at any time. Sports facilities are there. Students can play after college time which is after 4 PM. The mess food is neat and healthy. A different menu is provided daily.

individual_reviews.title: College is so good and helpful for students .

content.Placements: 40 percent students are placed. The highest package 12 Lacs, the lowest 2.40 lacs and average is 3 Lacs. Top recruiting companies are cipla, Pfizer. Many students got internship in Lupin, Milan pharmaceuticals. Pvt limited. Top roles offered in course are pharmacist.
content.Infrastructure: There are sufficient labs, classrooms, projectors, Wi-Fi, library in our college. Also college has the hostel facility for students and there is also proper food and canteen facility provided for students. Hostel rooms and classrooms are cleaned everyday by respective worker.

individual_reviews.title: It is the best college to gain practical knowledge.

content.Placements: The B pharmacy degree is of 4 years. After B.Pharma, you can do M pharma which is of 2 years. Our college offers placement in companies like TCS, Cognizant, and Flemingo. Various campus jobs like production and pharmacovigilance are offered. About 30% to 40% of the students are offered placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, and we have a proper library to study with all study materials. Classrooms with projectors are provided. Best labs with all modern equipment are provided. For students from different places, hostel service is provided with mess service.

individual_reviews.title: Pharmacy college with well-equipped machines, apparatus and satisfactory teaching method of faculty.

content.Placements: Companies like Tata Consultancy Services, Cognizant, were invited to place the students. Salary packages varied for different companies as students were hired for a probationary period for a year. The top roles that were offered were for eTMF, pharmacovigilance, and regulatory affairs.
content.Infrastructure: Every subject has different laboratories assigned. One will find all the chemicals, equipment of the latest models available at the laboratory. Classrooms are well-equipped with projectors. The library has a collection of books for varied fields that college offers. The college also provides hostel facilities, and canteen is made available. Sports events are given priority, and cultural and sports events are conducted for over a month.

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with its bus transportation.

content.Placements: There are 60 students in our class. The average salary package offered is 2.5 LPA, and it will increases gradually with students' experience. The top recruiting companies are Sun Pharma, Mankind, and many more famous companies in pharma. Drug inspectors, teachers, and R&D workers are the top roles offered in this course.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, laboratories are excellent, and it is also clean. Classrooms are good with projector facilities and benches are new. Library is the best in this college. Hostel and canteen facilities are also available. There is a separate girls' and boys' hostels, but the girls' hostel is near to the station.

faqs.answer: Yes, Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar Bihar University (BRABU) in Muzaffarpur, Bihar offers financial assistance through scholarships from the state government, central government, and other national agencies. The university also offers scholarships for female students. The state government offers scholarships to almost 100% of SC/ST/OBC, disabled students, and about 25% of other students.
faqs.question: Q: Are there any scholarship programmes for UG courses at BRABU, Bihar?

faqs.answer: BRABU is a good university for BA, but it's not perfect. Here are some of the things that BRABU does well for BA students:The faculty is experienced and qualified. You'll be taught by professors who know their stuff.There are a lot of BA programs to choose from. You can find a programme that's perfect for your interests.You have the opportunity to do research. If you're interested in conducting research, BRABU has a number of research centers and institutes that can help you get started.Tuition fees are affordable. You won't have to break the bank to attend BRABU.However, BRABU also has some challenges for BA students:Classes can be large. You may have to sit in a lecture hall with hundreds of other students.Resources can be limited. You may not have access to the same resources as students at more prestigious universities.It can be difficult to find a job after graduation. BRABU doesn't have a strong track record of placing students in jobs.

overview_faqs.question: How is BRABU for B.Sc?
overview_faqs.answer: BRABU is a university in Muzaffarpur, Bihar that offers a range of degrees, including B.Sc., M.Sc., B.Com., M.Com., B.Ed., and M.Ed. The university is connected to the UGC and has a B grade from the NAAC for accreditation. Student placements on campus are facilitated by the university's placement cell. Through education/freeship programs funded by the state government, the university provides students with scholarships and financial aid. The university employs 144 faculty members in addition to 1560 students. This college is good all around.

admission_process.title: Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar Bihar University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar Bihar University -BRABU offers various undergraduate -UG, postgraduate -PG, & diploma courses for the 2025 academic session. The bachelors programs last for three years. While the master's programs are two years long.
Check out the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar Bihar University course admissions 2025:
The admission process is detailed below:
1: Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar Bihar University Application Process 2025

The admission process at Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar Bihar University begins with the application process. The application form from the university's official website. The completed application form along with attested copies of academic documents, must be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department of BRABU. It is important to note that the application fee must be paid via bank drafts or multiple banker’s cheques, and Students should attach the pay slip along with the necessary documents.
2: Eligibility & Selection Criteria

Students must meet the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective courses they are applying for. Admission to various UG and PG courses involves fulfilling the eligibility requirements followed by qualifying in the selection rounds.
For instance:
3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, Students need to participate in the counselling process for the respective courses. The university will release the merit list in various rounds, listing the selected Students. Students who find their names on the merit list must pay a certain amount of fee to secure their seat.
Check out the below video for more information:

lists: MBA/PGDM: Students must have a graduation degree with at least 50% marks. The Students must qualify these exams- XAT, CAT, or CMAT.
BA: Students should have completed Class 12 with a minimum of 45% marks. Admission is merit-based.

BCom: Students should have completed Class 12 with a minimum of 50% marks. Admission is merit-based.

reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi in college, but it never works. The library is huge, and there are lots of books available. Classrooms are not well maintained. They are very dirty. There is ground for playing, but playing is not allowed during class time. The ID card is checked properly.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by L.N Mishra College of Business Management (LNMCBM)
reviews.review_heading: Decent infrastructure with supportive faculty members but limited facilities.
reviews.review_text: Campus of LN Mishra College offers Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, spacious classrooms, and a central library. Hostel, mess, and canteen facilities are not provided. Sports like badminton and basketball courts are available, along with some extracurricular activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by L.N Mishra College of Business Management (LNMCBM)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the outdated syllabus.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi on campus. Library facilities are good, and many books are available for studying. Classrooms are not cleaned timely. No hostel is available in the college. Students live in PGs or rented houses. There are two canteens on campus where you can buy things.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Jamuni Lal College, Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar Bihar UniversityReviewed on 17 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for BCA in Hajipur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the BCA course in our college is decent and improving every year. The classrooms are spacious and equipped with projectors, and the campus has Wi-Fi, which helps during practicals and assignments. There are computer labs with good internet and most of the required software installed.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Maharani Janki Kunwar College, Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar Bihar UniversityReviewed on 17 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good, but I wouldn't recommend anyone to take admission.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course and department are well. The availability of labs and classrooms is there. The library and Wi-Fi are also available. As per my knowledge, there is no hostel in the college, but the canteen, medical facilities, and sports are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Deo Chand College, Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar Bihar UniversityReviewed on 23 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I love this college very much.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good here. There are two types of buildings on the college campus, one is a newly constructed concrete building, and the other is an old, heritage-style building. One of the buildings is closed because of its old infrastructure. The hostel facility is also close to the institute. There is a sports ground, which is not provided by the college, or we say there is no ground in the college. Wi-Fi is available in labs, classrooms, and the library. Toilets and all are available in my...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Shree Raghav Prasad Singh College, Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar Bihar UniversityReviewed on 15 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is decent you should visit once.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average but manageable. Classrooms are simple, with basic benches and blackboards. Some have fans but don’t expect air conditioning. There is no smart classroom setup or projectors in regular use. Wi-Fi is generally not available for students, but sometimes faculty may use the internet for presentations. There are no dedicated computer labs for BBA students; however, you can request access to the common labs in other departments. The college library is functional and contai...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Ram Lakhan Singh Yadav College, Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar Bihar UniversityReviewed on 10 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good enough to spend four years in college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is decent but still good as compared to our peers, it has some issues like no proper Wi-Fi connections and problems with hostel allotment, but sports, medical, and canteen facilities are proper.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Tarkeshwar Prasad Varma College, Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar Bihar UniversityReviewed on 18 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Tarkeshwar Prasad Varma College - Campus life.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure includes labs, libraries, hostels, and canteens, along with Wi-Fi connectivity. Hostel facilities are available. The college also has a sports field and other amenities. Modern classrooms are air-conditioned with projectors, whiteboards, and comfortable seating.

placements.overview: UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 100 students were admitted at Laureate Institute of Pharmacy and 61 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 61 students 35 were placed with median salary of INR 239000 and 26 students opted for higher studies. A total of 100 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Laureate Institute of Pharmacyand 90 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 90 students 52 were placed with median salary of INR 239000 and 26 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 17 students were admitted at Laureate Institute of Pharmacy and 17 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 17 students 14 were placed with median salary of INR 297600. A total of 30 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Laureate Institute of Pharmacyand 30 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 30 students 15 were placed with median salary of INR 300000.

Facility in hostel was also very good, there were washing machines for students, and also there was no issue of electricity at all, students studied without any stress about electricity.

hostel.description: Vallabhbhai Patel Chest Institute hostel is a 3-storeyed building consisting of 30 rooms, 10 rooms on each floor for boys and girls studying D.M., M.D., DTCD and Ph.D. courses in the Institute. The rooms are free furnished and facilities of common room (for visitors, reading and watching TV. etc.). There is a well-equipped Mess with dining room and kitchen having all modern facilities. The rooms are allotted to the students of VPCI on first cum first serve basis.

reviews.review_heading: This is the worst college, and don't get admission here.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best Wi-Fi facility, labs, sports ground, etc. The hostel facilities are better. The campus is well-equipped with all the facilities in which Wi-Fi facility is the greatest among all of them. The campus structure is great as they get highly paid by us. But the education on the campus is the worst as nobody cares about it. All they need is only money.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and facilities here are really good.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the hostel, canteen, library, classrooms, labs, and Wi-Fi facilities are available. In this college, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen. If someone is suffering from each other, medical facilities are available. Sports and games are also available for students.

reviews.review_heading: College faculty members are good and you will enjoy college life.
reviews.review_text: The facilities that our college provides are above average and definitely you will enjoy everything in the college. The labs and classroom conditions are good for every student. Hostel is too near so you can easily attend all your classes.

reviews.review_heading: Some reviews I write who saved in my mind.
reviews.review_text: The syllabus for Economics Honours in Delhi University is the same as it is in the London School of Economics in London, UK. You can learn Statistics, Microeconomics, Macroeconomics, Mathematics Method of Economics, Econometrics; these are the subjects you have to learn in the whole Economics Honours course and some other extracurricular subjects.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend to other students to take admission at Delhi University.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi connection was very good. Labs are also good; all the instruments are available in the lab. Classroom is too good. Library condition was poor. Hostel room quality is average and food quality is also average. Canteen's condition was good. Medical facilities are available in the hostel. I don't care about sports and games .

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with a friendly environment and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good and comfortable. It provides good food and Wi-Fi. We have spacious classrooms and a library.

reviews_list.review_title: All things are good, and you don't want to leave college while passing out.

review_content.Placements: At least 90% to 95% of students got placed from our course. The salary package offered is a minimum of about 2.5 lacs for medical and other production facilities. In IT companies, you will get the highest salary package of up to 4 LPA. Students build their businesses all over the industry. Cipla, Sun Pharma, etc., are top recruiters here. college_info.intro: The popular programmes offered by Terna College of Engineering, Osmanabad are BTech, BPharma & MTech. The courses are offered in full-time mode. The students are taught the latest curriculum with practical experience. Terna College of Engineering offers a UG programmes in BTech Artificial Intelligence and Data Science programme. The seats offered in this programme is 60 and is for the duration of four years. This programme provides students with the opportunity to gain skills in latest Tech and Machine Learning. This improves the employability as well as make students future ready as traditional roles become outdated. Students can explore new career directions as AI Researchers, Data Scientists and Machine Learning Engineers. The below are the Terna College of Engineering courses and fee structure:

placements.overview:
Terna College of Engineering Training and Placement Cell facilitates the placement activities for the students. The placement cell as launched in 1995 in order to provide real-world exposure and training to the students. The placement cell of Terna College of Engineering has multiple tie-ups with reputed and esteemed organizations. The college organizes live projects and guest lectures to shape the practical learning of the students. Terna College of Engineering provides personality development in form of behavioral training to develop soft skills of the students.

Regular industry training is given to the students. Terna College of Engineering provides internships to the students. The students in the UG are given proper training for one month in companies such as , , , , , , , , , etc. The Terna College of Engineering gives a minimum of two internships per student.

reviews_list.review_title: The college isn't great but is considered good for girls in Osmanabad district.

review_content.Placements: In our batch, only 2 students got placement in TCS. After passing out, we did internships and courses to improve our chances of getting jobs. One student got selected for an associate role at TCS with a 3 LPA package.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college lacks well-maintained labs and sufficient classroom space. The buildings are old-fashioned, not ideal for computer and electronics students. There is a shortage of labs for various software programming. Practical sessions mostly involve reading and observations. Sports and games facilities are available but with extra charges.

reviews_list.review_title: It's an average college with good infrastructure and teaching faculty.

review_content.Placements: According to the report of our teachers, nearly 40% of students got placed in companies with an average salary of INR 13000–16000 per month and they were placed in TCS, Sun Pharma, some regional companies in quality control, and some in the production department.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is the best. Classrooms are attached to projectors and have a great, big library with all the books required for the course. The hostel is average, and most of the students prefer to live outside the hostel. The canteen is good but the mess is very bad.

review_summary.college_name: Terna Engineering College Osmanabad Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: They are a bachelors college.

content.Placements: 43% of students were placed in annual package of employees have 3.6LPA, and some students were placed as 2.8LPA, like good pharma companies in Maharashtra and Goa.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college was good, as the classrooms were good. Sitting arrangement as comfortable chair, good laboratory, better practical lab for each subject, electricity, well purified water for drinking, hostel was very good, all facilities of the college and hostel.
content.Faculty: In college, students and teachers strictly follow all rules. The time is very accurate for entering the exam and at the end of the exam. All facilities are available in the exam, which is a very good exam to clear.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: There is a lack of good placement opportunities.

content.Placements: In our branch, our HOD ma'am is taking charge of our training for recruiting in mass recruiting companies like Tech Mahindra and TCS. In our batch, 40 students have gotten jobs at 3 LPA as Associate Software Engineers or System Engineers. We did internships through HOD ma'am's reference, which will benefit us.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for computer engineering students is not adequate for practicals, and maintaining computer systems in classrooms is insufficient. The student mess and canteen do not offer hygienic food, but the grounds and sports facilities are well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The college isn't great but is considered good for girls in Osmanabad district.

content.Placements: In our batch, only 2 students got placement in TCS. After passing out, we did internships and courses to improve our chances of getting jobs. One student got selected for an associate role at TCS with a 3 LPA package.
content.Infrastructure: The college lacks well-maintained labs and sufficient classroom space. The buildings are old-fashioned, not ideal for computer and electronics students. There is a shortage of labs for various software programming. Practical sessions mostly involve reading and observations. Sports and games facilities are available but with extra charges.

individual_reviews.title: It's an average college with good infrastructure and teaching faculty.

content.Placements: According to the report of our teachers, nearly 40% of students got placed in companies with an average salary of INR 13000–16000 per month and they were placed in TCS, Sun Pharma, some regional companies in quality control, and some in the production department.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is the best. Classrooms are attached to projectors and have a great, big library with all the books required for the course. The hostel is average, and most of the students prefer to live outside the hostel. The canteen is good but the mess is very bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college for middle class students.

content.Placements: All the students of our college complete their internship at Cisco for 6 months in Aurangabad or online then everyone gets placement opportunities from Cognizant, TCS, Jio, and Mahindra from Bangalore. Around 90% of students get placed as developers in Java and HTML.
content.Infrastructure: It is a 250-acre campus with more facilities like Wi-Fi, etc. There are well-maintained labs for the computer department with IOS hardware and software. Hostels provided in our college are spacious and provided at affordable rates.

description: Terna Engineering College, Osmanabad cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Terna Engineering College, Osmanabad JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

Terna Engineering College, Osmanabad cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 530106 and 586855 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 530106, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 384178.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 530106.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.

For the General category, the Terna Engineering College, Osmanabad B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 4.44 and 41.45, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 41.45. Similarly, with a lowest last-round cutoff percentile of 4.44, Mechanical beca

Terna Engineering College, Osmanabad MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 41.45. For the same competitive branch/course, the last round cutoff was 69.27 in the General category under the HS quota.

reviews.review_heading: They are a bachelors college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college was good, as the classrooms were good. Sitting arrangement as comfortable chair, good laboratory, better practical lab for each subject, electricity, well purified water for drinking, hostel was very good, all facilities of the college and hostel.

reviews.review_heading: There is a lack of good placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for computer engineering students is not adequate for practicals, and maintaining computer systems in classrooms is insufficient. The student mess and canteen do not offer hygienic food, but the grounds and sports facilities are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: The college isn't great but is considered good for girls in Osmanabad district.
reviews.review_text: The college lacks well-maintained labs and sufficient classroom space. The buildings are old-fashioned, not ideal for computer and electronics students. There is a shortage of labs for various software programming. Practical sessions mostly involve reading and observations. Sports and games facilities are available but with extra charges.

reviews.review_heading: It's an average college with good infrastructure and teaching faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best. Classrooms are attached to projectors and have a great, big library with all the books required for the course. The hostel is average, and most of the students prefer to live outside the hostel. The canteen is good but the mess is very bad.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for middle class students.
reviews.review_text: It is a 250-acre campus with more facilities like Wi-Fi, etc. There are well-maintained labs for the computer department with IOS hardware and software. Hostels provided in our college are spacious and provided at affordable rates.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements, infrastructure, education, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is old. All facilities are available in this college. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories are very good. The library is well maintained. The food served in the mess is decent. Canteen is available. Sports and games are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Underrated, really great college for everyone with a successful and glorious history.
reviews.review_text: This college has a very old history dating back to 1983. The labs and main building have a very vast and large area, providing an Apple lab with Macbooks for practicals. The Cisco company also provides a special lab for computer science students. Wi-Fi labs are also there with great speed, and libraries are there with all facilities, like an AC-specially furnished reading room, on the college campus. Sports and games are played over large areas of turf beside our college. The college is situated...

reviews.review_heading: I recommend students from small town to admit here, instead of Pune and Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: Our college has an Apple lab with Macbooks and Linux software systems. Labs are Wi-Fi enabled. Systems are provided for all students. Many books are available in the library. There are reading rooms also. The hostel mess and canteen are well developed and maintained.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college. Our college supports students.
reviews.review_text: All labs have Wi-Fi and LAN networks. We have Apple Mac program computers. Our college has a very well-maintained library. All classrooms are well-maintained. The food served in the mess and canteen is very hygienic. Our college has a campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best place where you can learn different things.
reviews.review_text: The campus is quite good. College is near to the national highway, so it is easily accessible by students. The campus is located nearly 4 km away from the main city. Each depart has a separate building. We were having huge and spacious classrooms. Wi-Fi facilities are provided in the college. Hostel is not that good.

reviews.review_heading: About Terna public charitable trust, college of engineering Osmanabad.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classroom, and library are available in college. Mess and canteen are also available. Boys and girls hostels are also available on college campus with security. Terna Public Charitable Trust College of Engineering, Osmanabad, is located on Tuljapur Osmanabad road.

college_info.college_name: Srinivasarao College of Pharmacy,Visakhapatnam: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Srinivasarao College of Pharmacy,Visakhapatnam admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.review_title: I would highly recommend this college because faculty members are very good at their work.

review_content.Placements: Students should score 60% of CGPA in their academics to get placements. The salary package offered ranges probably between 1.8-2.5 LPA. Doctor Reddy's is the top recruiting company of our college. Students are offered with the role of a medical representative. In our course, the salary package offered ranges from 1.5L to 2.5 lacs for four years. Internships are depended on the students' interview. If a good student with a minimum percentage does well in the interview, then they can be placed well.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus provides free Wi-Fi access, and they have a well-maintain library where every book is quite available. The hostel is not attached to the college, but it comes under the teacher of its college, so it is quite safe. It has almost every facility.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good, and it is situated in a good place.

review_content.Placements: Almost 100% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary offered is 1.5 per month, and the lowest salary package offered is Rs. 15,000 per month. Top recruiting companies like Pfizer, Reddy's Laboratories and Aurobindo visit our campus for placements. Maximum all students from our course got an internship in companies like Pfizer, Aurobindo, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities available in our college are good. Our college provides very good labs with spacious rooms, a spacious library and spacious classrooms. Our college does not provide hostel facility, but there are privates hostels, which are run by the local people. Quality of the food served is good. The canteen is available in the college with good food at reasonable prices.

reviews_list.review_title: A good college with good coordination.

review_content.Placements: This college offers B.Pharm, Pharma.D, MPHARM, and MBA programs. It is located behind YSR Stadium in Visakhapatnam, providing a pleasant environment. At the end of the course, they offer placements with an average package of 3-5 LPA for B.Pharm students and Pharma.D would also have a similar package.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-furnished, and the boards used are black. They have good infrastructure, are well-ventilated, and are equipped with quality labs. There is also a large seminar hall with the latest smart board. A canteen is available, offering good food.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Appasaheb Birnale College of Pharmacy offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Pharma and D.Pharma. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.Pharma. Appasaheb Birnale College of Pharmacy courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Appasaheb Birnale College of Pharmacy courses stands around INR 12,000 to 3,85,292.

reviews_list.review_title: Excellent faculty, lazy crowd, limited campus, good opportunities.

review_content.Placements: Only around 45% of students from a batch were placed in good companies. Top recruiting companies were Apollo and Sun Pharma. Top roles offered include manager positions in pharmacies and assistants at big pharma companies. However, others who obtained their licenses opened their own pharmacies and medical stores.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are plenty of classrooms and very well-developed labs. The library has a very good and relevant collection of thousands of books worth 3 Cr. The hostel has great infrastructure; it is very well maintained and has good accommodations. The food and hygiene are good.

reviews_list.review_title: It is the best pharmacy college in Western Maharashtra.

review_content.Placements: Pharmacology and pharmaceutics roles are offered here, and campus interviews were not conducted for us. Our college only recommended us to do industrial training. This college didn't arrange any interviews in companies and didn't provide references for any kind of job also. So, you have to search for jobs on our own.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are very sophisticated and well equipped. All chemicals were available in laboratories, and the library contains almost all books. All the classrooms have projectors to display the contents. There are no Wi-Fi facilities. Hostels are not available in our college, but you may take admission in private hostels or opt for rooms on rent.

reviews_list.review_title: Worth college with placement.

review_content.Placements: Placement are offered now and students get minimum package start from 2.5 LPA and the highest package is 4 LPA. Many students can also try for the internship from their own basis if they want to try in big Pharma companies but college arrange their internship in Sangli nearby companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: When I was learning in college in year 2020-23 their is no any hostel facility for Boys, only hostel facility for Girls available. College infrastructure is very good and college library is also very big but college does not have a big campus except all college is Excellent.
